name: Ch'ien Ts'e Ng Kao (Steamed Thousand Layer Ca
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour in a large bowl. Dissolve the yeast in warm water (about 95 to 98 degrees F). Add the flour and knead for about 5 minutes until well mixed. Cover with a wet cloth and let rise until doubled in bulk.
2. Remove the dough onto a pastry board. Roll out until very thin, about 2 1/2 feet long and 1 foot wide. Spread some lard and sprinkle 1 tablespoon of sugar and some red dates on the dough. Fold the right third portion to cover the middle portion and spread lard and sugar evenly on top. Fold the left portion to the center to cover the right portion.
3. Turn the dough so that a folded edge faces you. Repeat the rolling procedure. Spread lard and sugar. Fold the layers twice more. Finally, fold the dough into 1 foot long and 8 inches wide. Let the cake rest for 30 minutes. Then place on a wet cloth on a steamer rack. Put the rack in place over boiling water. Steam for about 50 to 60 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before cutting into small squares or diamonds.
Serve.
